name: Hunter's Guile

abilities.name: Silent Stalker
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model would receive a (-) due to concealment, it instead receives a (+).

actions.name: Set the Ambush
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot be declared while engaged.
actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp. Then, this model may gain a Reload or an Aura (Concealment) token.

extraction_notes: Card shows Lord Cooper, Huntmaster in combat pose with crossbow
Abilities section shows specific icon symbols for concealment tokens in original text
Table header shows: Tactical Action | Rg | Skl | Rst | TN | Dmg with all dashes indicating no values
